model: the mspn registers the measurement at the go
the go examines the application of the mspn
the go rejects the application of the mspn
the go confirmes the application of the mspn

user_text:
The process begins with the initial step where the MSPN registers the measurement at the GO. Following this, the GO takes the next step to examine the application submitted by the MSPN. After examining the application, a decision point is reached where the GO must choose between two possible outcomes.

If the GO decides to reject the application of the MSPN, the process moves to the step where the GO formally rejects the application. After this rejection, the process continues to a decision point that leads to the next step.

Alternatively, if the GO confirms the application of the MSPN, the process proceeds to the same decision point as after the rejection. Regardless of whether the application was rejected or confirmed, the process then moves forward to the next step.

In this subsequent step, the GO assigns the MSPN. Once the assignment is made, the GO informs the MSPO about this assignment. Following this, the GO also informs the MPO about the assignment of the MSPN. Finally, the GO informs the SP about the assignment of the MSPN. With these notifications completed, the process comes to an end.
output_text:
The process begins with the initial step where the MSPN registers a measurement at the GO. Following this, the GO takes the next step to examine the application submitted by the MSPN. After examining the application, a decision point is reached where the GO must choose between two possible outcomes.

In one scenario, the GO decides to reject the application of the MSPN. If this happens, the process moves to the next step where the GO confirms this rejection decision.

In the other scenario, the GO confirms the application of the MSPN. Once this confirmation is made, the process continues to the next step.

Regardless of whether the application is rejected or confirmed, the process converges at a point where the GO assigns the MSPN. Simultaneously, the GO informs the MSPO about this assignment.

Following the assignment, the GO proceeds to inform the MPO about the assignment of the MSPN. After this, the GO also informs the SP about the assignment of the MSPN.

The process concludes after the GO has informed all relevant parties about the assignment of the MSPN.
